message:
Add unit tests for runtime hooks and quiescence

test_hooks.c: 46 tests covering hook init/validate/install, allocator
seal, fault injection (clock skew, entropy const, alloc fail), all
hook-backed dispatchers, config init, safety profiles, containment
policies.

test_quiescence.c: 16 tests covering branch-level quiescence checks,
region drain lifecycle, budget exhaustion, cleanup LIFO ordering,
obligation resolution paths, and full drain-to-close sequences.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
